name: Realistic tools/list from a real MCP server
notes: Modeled on @modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem. Multiple tools, all descriptions are legitimate.

tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read the complete contents of a file as text or binary.

tools.name: write_file
tools.description: Write text or binary content to a file, creating parent directories as needed.

tools.name: list_directory
tools.description: List entries (files and subdirectories) in a given directory path.

tools.name: search_files
tools.description: Recursively search for files matching a pattern under a directory.
